meters_between_routes.description: Minimum distance between routes in meters

minutes_between_routes.description: Minimum time between routes in minutes

fog_of_war_meters.description: Fog of war radius in meters

time_threshold_minutes.description: Time threshold for grouping points in minutes

merge_threshold_minutes.description: Threshold for merging nearby points in minutes

speed_colored_routes.description: Whether to color routes based on speed

points_rendering_mode.description: How to render points on the map (raw, heatmap, etc.)

live_map_enabled.description: Whether live map updates are enabled

immich_url.description: Immich server URL for photo integration

immich_api_key.description: API key for Immich photo service

photoprism_url.description: PhotoPrism server URL for photo integration

photoprism_api_key.description: API key for PhotoPrism photo service
